title: e2e: use parallel-safe /dev subdirectories
body:
Replace /dev/foodevdir with unique paths, to avoid one
test's RemoveAll() from stepping on another test.

Closes: #18958

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```
